_comment: Monthly Parameter Hunt challenges. 'month' is YYYY-MM (empty = always active). 'kind' is one of: discover | map | schema. Progress counts real-car events only (simulator runs are practice). Updated via pull request.

challenge.title: July: N54 Local Sweep
challenge.description: Discover 5 new responding local identifiers this month

challenge.title: July: Name That Byte
challenge.description: Map 2 unknown bytes to physical values this month

challenge.title: Schema Pioneer
challenge.description: Save a confirmed freeze-frame schema for any ECU
